title: Tamil Nadu government formation LIVE: TVK chief Vijay to take oath as Chief Minister tomorrow
content: This was the fourth time TVK chief Vijay had met the Governor in a period of four days; Mr. Vijay and nine other Ministers are set to be sworn in tomorrow.

title: SC order on Mysuru heritage structures: MP seeks immediate restoration works
content: Stating that Mysuru’s historic civic architecture was inseparable from the city’s identity, Mr. Wadiyar says he remained committed to protecting the cultural and tourism heritage of Mysuru

title: TVK’s Vijay to take oath as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister on May 10
content: Mr. Vijay earlier called on Governor Rajendra Vishwanath Arlekar at Lok Bhavan in Chennai to stake claim to form a TVK-led coalition government in Tamil Nadu

title: Regional, caste calculus in BJP’s West Bengal Cabinet choices
content: BJP gives Ministerial berths to representatives of the Matua, tribal, OBC, Rajbangshi, Brahmin, and Kayastha communities; there is one women in Suvendu Adhikari’s Council of Ministers

title: Driving change in an autorickshaw: This Bengaluru NGO is helping single mothers, abuse survivors rise from the ashes
content: Swavalambi Stree Auto-Rickshaw Driving Initiative by Bengaluru-based NGO Taliru Foundation has supported many women

title: Stalin urges new Tamil Nadu government to continue DMK regime’s schemes
content: He also welcomed alliance partners’ statements that they would continue to remain in the Secular Progressive Alliance (SPA) led by the DMK, even though they had extended support to

title: Suvendu Adhikari sworn in as first BJP Chief Minister of West Bengal
content: Five other BJP MLAs—Dilip Ghosh, Agnimitra Paul, Ashok Kirtania, Kshudiram Tudu and Nisith Pramanik—also administered oath of office and secrecy as ministers by Governor R N Ravi.

title: AI-driven fraud detection emerges key focus at Ayushman Bharat hackathon
content: Anti-fraud systems deployed have already prevented fraudulent claims worth around ₹630 crore under the scheme

title: Stalin urges new Tamil Nadu government to continue DMK regime’s schemes
content: He welcomes the statement of alliance partners that they will on with the Secular Progressive Alliance even though they have extended support to the TVK

title: TCS case | Nida Khan subjected to a trial by media, says Owaisi
content: ‘The complainant is associated with the ruling party,’ the AIMIM leader alleges, adding that nobody could be held guilty unless duly proven in the court of law

title: Prime Minister Modi to visit Karnataka, Telangana, Gujarat on May 10-11
content: PM Modi will also launch nation-wide service initiatives of the Art of Living, encompassing year-long projects focused on mental well-being, rural development, nature conservation and social transformation

title: NIT-C report on Brahmpuram legacy waste likely on May 11
content: NIT-C, reappointed by the newly elected UDF council, had during the previous LDF tenure identified an additional 1.46 lakh tonnes of legacy waste beyond the 7 lakh tonnes initially estimated for biomining

title: Kerala Police issue warning over online shopping scam
content: Police say that fraudsters are approaching customers by posing as fake customer care representatives of mattress companies

title: Nandyal MP assures TDP support towards Dalits, Christians
content: Byreddy Shabari says she will bring the legitimate demands of Dalits and Christians to the notice of Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu and get them resolved during a rally in Nandyal

title: Mysuru: Government faces backlash for pushing ahead with school mergers
content: AIDSO Mysuru District Committee alleges that while the government claims to be building a model education system through its “8 Guarantees” for education, it is simultaneously closing down government schools through mergers

title: Kharge attacks Modi govt for ending MGNREGA, 'finishing off right to work'
content: “The friend of select capitalists, the BJP Government, is fully committed to wiping out the rights of the poor and this is what truly exposes its real policy and intent towards them,” Mr. Kharge alleged

title: Only 9.64% of Kerala schools provide continuous schooling till class XII, finds NITI Aayog report
content: As many as 1,520 schools in the State provide integrated education from class I to XII, says report. It warns that a fragmented progression structure that compels students to change institutions multiple times increases the risk of dropout

title: Govt. using police to curb dissent and free speech in Andhra Pradesh, alleges Jagan
content: This demonstrates how the government is using the department as its political enforcement machinery, says the YSRCP president

title: Kerala Assembly Polls 2026: KC(M) blames cross-voting by CPI(M), minority consolidation for poll debacle
content: Party chairman Jose K. Mani rules out possibility of merger with the rival faction led by P.J. Joseph or a shift to UDF; says the core support base largely held firm even amidst a massive pro-UDF wave

title: Horsley Hills to enhance facilities ahead of tourist season
content: During a review meeting with district heads of various departments, Joint Collector Shiv Narayan Sharma instructs them to speed up pending works and ensure its completion on time

title: Kodagu cracks down on illegal homestays, tightens tourist safety norms
content: The move comes as Kodagu, one of the State’s leading tourist destinations, witnesses a sharp increase in private accommodations catering to tourists, many of which are allegedly operating without regulatory supervision.

title: Settipalle township model declared fourth-best initiative at A.P. Collectors’ Conference
content: Land Pooling Scheme ends the five-decade-old ordeals associated with registrations of 636.38 acres of inam land at Settipalle on the outskirts of Tirupati

title: Police launch probe after hoax mail threatens blasts across Kerala
content: Email received by a District Collector in Rajasthan claimed that explosions would occur at courts and collectorates across Kerala

title: KMML transforms former mining sites into organic farms
content: Under Haritham ee Theeram project, KMML’s Mineral Separation unit has proven that biological rejuvenation of mined-out areas is not only possible but highly sustainable. Launched in 2022, the initiative has rapidly evolved from a land recovery experiment into a thriving agricultural hub

title: From 107 to 120: Inside backstage drama that delayed Vijay's grand premiere
content: For actor-turned-politician C Joseph Vijay, the days following the May 4 Tamil Nadu assembly election results were less about celebration and more about survival arithmetic. TVK emerged as the single-largest party with 108 seats in the 234-member assembly, placing Vijay within striking distance of the chief minister’s chair but still 10 short of the majority mark of 118.

title: 'Sacrifice etched in BJP's journey': PM Modi's tribute to party workers killed in Bengal
content: A temporary memorial honouring the slain BJP workers was erected near the stage at Kolkata’s Brigade Parade Ground, where Suvendu Adhikari and his council of ministers took oath earlier in the day. The memorial displayed the names of the “martyrs” along with the districts they belonged to. Shah also shared a video of the memorial and said it had evoked “deep emotions” among party workers present at the oath-taking venue.

title: War 'drones' on: From blitz to grind - is Putin's Ukraine strategy starting to crack?
content: By mid-2026, Russia's Ukraine invasion has transformed into a grinding conflict.  Ukraine's successful drone warfare and long-range strikes on Russian infrastructure are reshaping the battlefield.  Russia, adapting with infiltration tactics and glide bombs, faces a new, industrialized war of attrition.  European aid bolsters Ukraine's defense, while diplomatic progress remains stalled.

title: After 43 yrs, US family sells electrical firm for $1.7bn; gives 540 workers $240m
content: A US-based businessman, Graham Walker, gifted his 540 employees a staggering $240 million from the $1.7 billion sale of his family's company, Fibrebond Corp. This generous act, where workers received an average of $443,000, stemmed from a condition Walker imposed before the sale to power-management giant Eaton.

title: Shubman Gill-Sai Sudharsan equal all-time IPL record
content: Shubman Gill and Sai Sudharsan achieved a significant milestone for Gujarat Titans, registering their sixth century partnership for the opening wicket in IPL 2026. This remarkable feat against Rajasthan Royals matches the IPL record held by legendary opening pairs from Sunrisers Hyderabad. The duo's dominant performance once again provided a strong foundation for their team.

title: No escape from the heat: Why scientists are sweating over warmer nights
content: Nights are warming faster than days globally, impacting crops, ecosystems, and human health. Cities trap heat due to concrete and lack of green cover, while rising greenhouse gases act like a thicker blanket, preventing heat escape. This 'asymmetric warming' alarms scientists, indicating a fundamental shift in the planet's ability to cool itself.

title: 'You have 10 working days to voluntarily recognise unions': Google UK staff tells company
content: Google's DeepMind employees are demanding union recognition amid concerns over their AI technology's use by the US and Israeli militaries. Workers seek a commitment against developing AI weapons and surveillance tools, urging management to voluntarily recognize their unions or face legal action. The move highlights growing anxieties about AI's ethical implications and its potential for harm.

title: Why Riyan Parag is not playing for Rajasthan Royals vs Gujarat Titans
content: Yashasvi Jaiswal is captaining Rajasthan Royals for the first time in IPL 2026 against Gujarat Titans due to Riyan Parag's hamstring injury. Jaiswal won the toss and opted to bowl first, confirming Parag's expected quick return. Gujarat Titans also would have preferred to bowl, with Shubman Gill emphasizing the team's confidence in close wins.

title: 'To prevent President's rule and ...': VCK chief gives 2 reasons for backing TVK
content: Thol Thirumavalavan's VCK party has pledged unconditional support to Vijay's TVK, aiming to ensure Tamil Nadu's political stability and avert President's rule. This move, made independently while remaining in the DMK alliance, bolsters TVK's numbers to a majority.  Vijay is now expected to stake his claim to form the government.

title: Coinbase reports service issues, points finger at AWS cloud outage
content: A cooling issue at an Amazon Web Services data center in Northern Virginia caused widespread service disruptions. Cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase and derivatives giant CME Group were among the affected. AWS confirmed increased temperatures in a single data center impacted services. Efforts to restore cooling capacity led to extended outages for some customers. The primary issue is now resolved.

title: Mumbai Indians drop big Hardik Pandya, Surya update ahead of MI vs RCB clash
content: Mumbai Indians will face Royal Challengers Bengaluru without star allrounder Hardik Pandya, who is still being evaluated by the medical team for a back spasm. Suryakumar Yadav will continue to captain the side in Pandya's absence for the crucial IPL 2026 encounter in Raipur.

title: 'How did he ... ?': Virat Kohli's first reaction to Prince's 'dream delivery'
content: Prince Yadav's stunning delivery that bowled Virat Kohli for a duck in IPL 2026 has earned him high praise. Bowling coach Bharat Arun called it a 'dream ball' and lauded the young pacer's significant improvement this season, backing him for future national representation.  Arun also expressed confidence in other LSG bowlers like Mayank Yadav and Mohsin Khan.

title: 28-year-old woman drugged, 'sexually assaulted' in Kerala; accused arrested
content: An auto-rickshaw driver in Kerala's Adoor has been arrested for allegedly drugging and sexually assaulting a woman. The accused, Vinod, reportedly threatened the victim with videos of the assault, leading her to inform her husband and eventually file a police complaint. Following an intensified investigation, Vinod was apprehended.

title: Happy Mother's Day 2026: Top wishes, quotes & greetings for mom
content: This Mother's Day, move beyond generic greetings to honor the women who raised you with meaningful messages. The article offers categorized heartfelt, witty, and minimalist quotes, acknowledging the "mental load" and celebrating "mothers of choice."

title: ‘Should be behind bars’- Ex-India cricketer erupts over Chahal’s viral vape video
content: Yuzvendra Chahal faces controversy after a video surfaced allegedly showing him vaping on a team flight. Former spinner Laxman Sivaramakrishnan criticized the lenient penalties for such violations, especially after a similar incident involving Riyan Parag. The BCCI recently reiterated its strict ban on vapes and e-cigarettes across all IPL venues and facilities.

title: Drishyam 3 trailer: Mohanlal's Georgekutty back in another gripping Jeethu Joseph thriller
content: The trailer for 'Drishyam 3' has been released, showcasing Mohanlal's Georgekutty facing a new deadly mystery. The film promises to be an enthralling and emotional thriller, continuing the gripping saga from its predecessors. With a strong cast and crew, the movie is set for a worldwide theatrical release on May 21, 2026.

title: TN govt formation: TVK crosses magic number after VCK, IUML back Vijay
content: With TVK possessing the support of 120 MLAs, Vijay is expected to form the govt soon. The governor is likely to invite Vijay to form the govt. The date for the swearing-in ceremony will be announced officially by the governor.

title: 56 new MLAs in Tamil Nadu have murder, crimes against women cases pending
content: While 19 out of 107 winning candidates from TVK have serious criminal cases against them, 14 candidates each from DMK and AIADMK parties have serious cases.

title: Mike Vrabel’s Patriots future clearer amid Dianna Russini drama
content: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, has resumed his professional duties, days after the former New York Times’ NFL reporter and insider, Dianna Russini, stepped down from her prestigious role, owing to their alleged affair drama, sparking chaos among fans. While Dianna Russini and her husband have remained distant from the drama, all eyes are on whether Mike Vrabel will be fired by the New England Patriots due to the scandalous drama.

title: ‘Zombie challenge’ in Coimbatore? 28-year-old arrested over staged social media video
content: Coimbatore police have arrested a 28-year-old man for staging a video of himself acting like a "zombie" in a public place. The accused, H Badhusa Khan, posted the footage online to gain social media attention by mimicking drug-induced behavior. He was subsequently arrested and remanded in judicial custody.

title: ITR filing: What are the nuances of new income tax return forms?
content: A nuanced understanding of the various ITR forms for FY 2025–26 is essential for globally mobile professionals, domestic salaried taxpayers, and individual investors

title: 'Ek chakke ke kitne paise milte hain?': Pak cricketer's chat with police goes viral
content: Pakistan cricketer Irfan Khan Niazi was recently pulled over by traffic police for not wearing a seat belt. The officer, a fan, engaged in a friendly chat about cricket and the PSL before letting him go with a warning. Irfan, a national player, was urged to prioritize safety and encourage others to follow traffic rules.

title: 19-year-old girl and her sister-in-law fight off crocodile with sickles in UP
content: A 19-year-old girl in Aligarh district bravely fought off a crocodile attack on the Kali river, fending off the reptile with sickles alongside her sister-in-law. The crocodile had clamped onto the girl's left hand, but their fierce resistance forced it to retreat. She sustained severe injuries to three fingers requiring surgery.

title: Massive blunder! Broadcasters show India scorecard during Pakistan match
content: During the Pakistan vs. Bangladesh Test match in Dhaka, broadcasters mistakenly displayed India's scorecard instead of Pakistan's Playing XI. This significant error, which occurred after Pakistan won the toss and chose to field, quickly went viral online, sparking widespread reactions and memes among fans. The broadcasters have yet to issue an official statement regarding the incident.

title: TVK functionary attempts self-immolation as Vijay’s CM ambition faces delay
content: A 47-year-old Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) functionary, Isakkiappan, attempted self-immolation in Tirunelveli, reportedly due to frustration over his party leader Vijay's delayed Chief Ministership. Previously known for a unique penance for Vijay's electoral success, Isakkiappan's distress over TVK's political pace led to the incident. Bystanders intervened, and he is receiving intensive medical care.

title: 'I bow to Bengal's Jana Shakti': PM Modi kowtows to Kolkata crowd as BJP forms first govt
content: Prime Minister Modi expressed profound gratitude to the people of Bengal, bowing with folded hands after the BJP's historic Assembly election victory. Alongside new chief minister Adhikari, he shared an emotional moment with 98-year-old veteran Makhanlal Sarkar, even touching his feet in a gesture of deep respect. This marks a significant shift in West Bengal's political landscape.

title: 11 years on, Jan Suraksha schemes deliver Rs 25,000 cr safety net for crores of Indians
content: Jan Suraksha programmes have paid out nearly Rs 25,160 crore in claims over a decade, with millions enrolled in life cover, accident insurance, and pension schemes. Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman highlighted the success of PMJJBY, PMSBY, and APY in providing affordable social security, especially for vulnerable sections.

title: Rs 5.5 lakh! Arjuna Awardee slams chess federation over unpaid prize money
content: Abhijeet Gupta has alleged that his Rs 5.5 lakh winner’s prize from the Odisha GM Open, held in January 2026 with a Rs 45 lakh prize pool, remains unpaid. The Arjuna Awardee criticised organisers and the All India Chess Federation for a lack of accountability, saying repeated emails went unanswered. Gupta urged authorities to protect the “dignity and trust” of Indian chess players.

title: From dependence on imports to self-reliance - India’s defence transformation accelerates
content: India is significantly boosting defence spending and prioritizing domestic production, aiming for self-reliance and export growth. New policies like 'Make in India' and DAP 2020 are reshaping procurement, encouraging local manufacturing and foreign collaboration. Despite global supply chain challenges, indigenous production and exports are rising, signaling a strategic shift towards greater defence capability and autonomy.

title: POCSO case against Union minister Bandi Sanjay's son; he files counter FIR
content: Union minister's son, Bandi Bageerath, was booked in a POCSO case for allegedly harassing a 17-year-old girl. Simultaneously, he filed a complaint against the girl and her parents, accusing them of honey-trapping him and demanding Rs 5 crore to drop the allegations.

title: Vijay Deverakonda meets fans with wife Rashmika on birthday; sweet moment goes viral
content: Actor Vijay Deverakonda celebrated his 37th birthday with fans outside his home, joined by wife Rashmika Mandanna. The couple's affectionate interaction and cake-cutting with fans garnered significant attention online. Brother Anand Deverakonda also shared heartfelt wedding pictures, highlighting the family's joy. Vijay is currently working on upcoming films, marking a significant phase in his life and career.

title: From Dilip Ghosh to Agnimitra Paul - what BJP’s first West Bengal cabinet looks like
content: Suvendu Adhikari took oath as the new Chief Minister of West Bengal. The BJP secured a significant win in the 2026 assembly elections. Several prominent leaders attended the swearing-in ceremony. The new government includes ministers like Dilip Ghosh, Agnimitra Paul, Ashok Kirtania, Kshudiram Tudu, and Nisith Pramanik. The state saw record voter turnout.

title: Catch-22 for visa applicants as US adds 2 more questions
content: US non-immigrant visa applicants now face new questions about experiencing or fearing harm in their home countries, with affirmative answers potentially leading to denial. This change could impact future asylum claims, as applicants might be challenged on the veracity of their statements. Immigration experts suggest these questions target legal immigrants who might later seek asylum.

title: Tamil Nadu Government Formation LIVE: Vijay, Now With Majority, Stakes Claim To Form Government
content: Tamil Nadu Election Results 2026 Live Updates: There is buzz that the Dravidian arch-rivals DMK and AIADMK may come together after over 50 years to form a government and keep Vijay out of power.

title: Vijay's Numbers Nightmare Ends, VCK And IUML Extend Support
content: Sources told NDTV that VCK has extended its unconditional support to the TVK to form the first coalition government in Tamil Nadu.

title: "AI-Generated": AMMK's TTV Dhinakaran Trashes Letter Of Support To Vijay
content: The TVK had reached out to the AMMK for the support of its lone MLA-elect Kamaraj S to stitch together a working coalition.

title: All About Turkey's New 'Yldrmhan' Missile That Can 'Hit' US Mainland
content: The missile was introduced at the SAHA 2026 Defence and Aerospace Exhibition, but defence experts remain unconvinced about its claimed capabilities.

title: Powerful Iranian Ultra-Hardliners Mobilise Against Iran-US Nuclear Talks
content: The group known as “Jebhe-ye Paydari” and described as “Super Revolutionaries,” has emerged as one of the loudest opponents of any agreement with Washington.

title: Sheikh Hasina Praises Suvendu Adhikari: 'Strong, People-Oriented Leadership'
content: Suvendu Adhikari was sworn in as Bengal's chief minister along with four other members of the state Council of Ministers at a high-profile ceremony.

title: Man, 40, Sexually Assaults Sleeping Minor On Train In Kerala, Arrested: Cops
content: A six-year-old girl was "sexually assaulted" by a man while she was travelling with her grandfather on the compartment floor of the Palaruvi Express from Kerala to Tamil Nadu, police said.

title: Pak General's 'Why English?' Jab At Indian Army Backfires Into Meme Fest
content: Operation Sindoor was launched last year after the Pahalgam terror attack in which 26 people were killed.

title: 17 Mumbai Locations Linked To Anil Ambani-Led Reliance Group Raided By CBI
content: The Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) on Saturday said it has conducted searches at 17 premises in Mumbai in connection with three cases registered against Anil Ambani-led Reliance ADA Group companies.

title: AIADMK Says No To VCK Boss As Chief Minister In Alliance With DMK: Sources
content: The VCK secured just two out of Tamil Nadu's total 234 seats. That's less than 1% of the total assembly strength.

title: North Korea Adopts Policy For Nuclear Strike If Kim Jong Un Is Killed: Report
content: The move comes months after top Iranian leaders, including Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and several senior advisers, were assassinated by US and Israeli military operations.

title: PM Modi Touches Feet Of 97-Year-Old Makhanlal Sarkar In Bengal: Who Is He?
content: Makhan Lal Sarkar was the aide of Shyama Prasad Mookerjee and part of his last journey, said Bengal BJP chief Samik Bhattacharya.

title: How 4 Men Used ChatGPT And Design Software To Run Fake IPL Ticket Racket
content: The police said the group had earlier tried to sell fake IPL tickets outside Delhi’s Arun Jaitley Stadium.

title: Dilip Ghosh, Agnimitra Paul Among 5 In Suvendu Adhikari's Cabinet
content: The five ministers took the oath in the presence of Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Union Home Minister Amit Shah, among other top dignitaries.

title: Adani Agri Fresh To Begin Cherry Procurement In Himachal Pradesh
content: Lucknow, May 9 (IANS) Adani Agri Fresh Limited (AAFL), a wholly-owned subsidiary of Adani Enterprises Limited (AEL), has announced its entry into the stone fruit category, which includes fruits such as cherries, with plans to begin procurement in Him

title: Why Temperatures Across India Have Remained Unusually Mild In May
content: Several areas in north, east and central India have witnessed temperatures far lower than what is typical for this time of year.

title: Goa Declares 82 Lakh Square Metres As No Development Zone To Protect Hills
content: The Union Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change has approved the Goa Forest Department's proposal to declare large stretches along the Mandovi and Zuari riverbanks as eco-sensitive zones.

title: Has Mamata Banerjee Finally Conceded? Updated X Bio Drops A Big Hint
content: Mamata Banerjee updated her X bio this morning to reflect that she was the chief minister in three previous terms.
